name: ls-idv-customer
description: Verifies an existing life sciences customer by unique identifier, account number, and/or phone. Returns last ordered product history for reorder context.

uniqueIdentifier.description: Customer unique ID (e.g. UID-LS-0042). Aliases: uniqueId, uid.

accountNumber.description: Account / unique number (e.g. ACC-88421). Aliases: uniqueNumber, customerNumber.

phone.description: Australian mobile +61 4… or 04…. Aliases: phoneNumber, mobile, ani.

statedLastProduct.description: What the caller says they last ordered (e.g. Normal Saline). Compared to on-file lastOrder for IDV. Aliases: lastOrderProduct, statedProductName.

statedLastQuantity.description: Quantity the caller states for last order. Aliases: lastOrderQuantity, statedQuantity.

statedLastUnit.description: case/cases or bag/bags for stated last order. Aliases: lastOrderUnit, statedUnit.
